prs.title: Ch/collector llm
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Spreads 92 custom lines across 17 files touching AI agent wiring, model factory, structured output, and multiple tool integrations — modest but meaningful AI/agent scaffolding work.

prs.title: Release: Production deployment with onboarding improvements, impersonation fixes, and AI system refactoring
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 364 custom lines across a broad release PR covering AI system refactoring, onboarding improvements, impersonation fixes, and layout context changes across 40+ files — significant multi-area integration effort.

prs.title: Update onboarding confirmation message
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-line change to an onboarding confirmation message is a trivial copy/text update.

prs.title: Multi-user onboarding and impersonation UX improvements
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 116 lines across 9 files adding multi-user onboarding flow improvements, impersonation UX (banner, layouts, actions) — a solid cohesive feature touching multiple layers.

prs.title: Fix impersonation bugs and improve admin experience
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 161 custom lines (after stripping 92% vendored) across 18 files fixing impersonation bugs and improving admin experience with audit events, queue pages, DAL changes, and layout propagation — broad, meaningful platform work.

prs.title: Staging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 37 custom lines across 12 files with a stepper/breadcrumb removal and minor layout/action adjustments — small-medium refactor touching several readiness UI pieces.

stories.name: Admin Impersonation & Onboarding Experience Overhaul
stories.rationale: A coordinated set of fixes and improvements across admin impersonation tooling, multi-user onboarding UX, confirmation messaging, and a production release that bundled all these changes together into a deployable state.

stories.name: AI Collector Agent Integration
stories.rationale: Introduced LLM-powered collector agent functionality, advancing Skematic's AI-driven data gathering capabilities.
